diagrams.title: Eigenvector Transformation
diagrams.description: Shows how eigenvector remains in same direction under linear transformation while only scaling
elements: v and Av lie on same line through origin
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the fundamental definition Av = λv

diagrams.title: Characteristic Equation Setup
elements: Set equal to zero for equation
diagrams.purpose: Remember the systematic procedure for finding eigenvalues

diagrams.title: Eigenspace Visualization
diagrams.description: 2D representation showing eigenspace as lines through origin
elements: Eigenvalue λ₁ with its eigenvector line
Eigenvalue λ₂ with its eigenvector line
Origin point common to both eigenspaces
Geometric multiplicity shown as line (1D) vs point (0D)
diagrams.purpose: Understand geometric meaning of eigenspace and multiplicities

diagrams.title: Diagonalization Process
elements: Transforming matrix P with eigenvectors as columns
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the diagonalization process and role of P matrix
